name: tinkercad
title: 3D Design in TinkerCAD
description: Design a 3D object by dragging shapes, resizing, combining, and exporting as STL for 3D printing.
prompt: Go to TinkerCAD, start a new design, create a simple phone stand using basic shapes, group them, and export as STL
narration_script_text:
Future Da Vincis, stop doom-scrolling. We're turning what if into heck yeah.

Welcome to Tinkercad. No login maze. Hit Learn.

Type in 3D design basics. We're here for CAD, not fluff.

Nice. Stay on 3D. That's the lane.

Quality check. Click a lesson. Clean visuals, real steps, no clutter.

Look at those Airbus moon lessons.

From shaky circles to NASA vibes in one click.

Now hit Gallery. This is where inspiration wakes up.

Boom. 9 million designs. Inspiration problem solved.

Grab the March 2026 Spartan Helmet.

Open it. Study the crest. That's research, not cheating.

Learn it. Browse it. Build it. Make something cool.

steps.caption: Step 1: Open TinkerCAD - Autodesk's free platform for 3D learning and design
steps.description: Open TinkerCAD - Autodesk's free platform for 3D learning and design
steps.narration: Future Da Vincis, stop doom-scrolling. We're turning what if into heck yeah.

steps.caption: Step 2: Open the Learning Center where beginner tutorials are available without login
steps.description: Open the Learning Center where beginner tutorials are available without login
steps.narration: Welcome to Tinkercad. No login maze. Hit Learn.

steps.caption: Step 3: Search for beginner 3D design tutorials using the search bar
steps.description: Search for beginner 3D design tutorials using the search bar
steps.narration: Type in 3D design basics. We're here for CAD, not fluff.

steps.caption: Step 4: Stay on the 3D Design track while the search results load
steps.description: Stay on the 3D Design track while the search results load
steps.narration: Nice. Stay on 3D. That's the lane.

steps.caption: Step 5: Scroll through the lesson cards and scan for clear beginner-friendly tutorials
steps.description: Scroll through the lesson cards and scan for clear beginner-friendly tutorials
steps.narration: Quality check. Click a lesson. Clean visuals, real steps, no clutter.

steps.caption: Step 6: Open an Airbus moon lesson to view the guided project details
steps.description: Open an Airbus moon lesson to view the guided project details
steps.narration: Look at those Airbus moon lessons.

steps.caption: Step 7: Scroll through the Airbus moon lesson to review the visuals and instructions
steps.description: Scroll through the Airbus moon lesson to review the visuals and instructions
steps.narration: From shaky circles to NASA vibes in one click.

steps.caption: Step 8: Open the Community Gallery to explore standout Tinkercad designs
steps.description: Open the Community Gallery to explore standout Tinkercad designs
steps.narration: Now hit Gallery. This is where inspiration wakes up.

steps.caption: Step 9: Browse the gallery and keep the top community designs in view
steps.description: Browse the gallery and keep the top community designs in view
steps.narration: Boom. 9 million designs. Inspiration problem solved.

steps.caption: Step 10: Open the Greek Spartan Helmet - March 2026 design from the gallery
steps.description: Open the Greek Spartan Helmet - March 2026 design from the gallery

steps.caption: Step 11: View the 3D model and inspect how the Spartan Helmet design is built
steps.description: View the 3D model and inspect how the Spartan Helmet design is built
steps.narration: Open it. Study the crest. That's research, not cheating.

steps.caption: Step 12: Tutorial complete - learn it, browse it, build it
steps.description: Tutorial complete - learn it, browse it, build it
steps.narration: Learn it. Browse it. Build it. Make something cool.
